testsuite.name: gui.signUp.SignUpTest

testcase.name: Create user with valid Credentials
testcase.failure: Element not found {img[alt='User profile']} Expected: visible Screenshot: file:/C:/Users/salam/IdeaProjects/OnlineStore/build/reports/tests/1776143015369.0.png Page source:
